# Ship a clear talk

From brief to browser-ready deck

- Bruno Capuano
- Demo day

??? notes
- Open with the promise: one source file in, one `slides.html` out.
- Tell the audience this format stays easy to edit in any client.

---

# Why this format works

- YAML carries deck-wide metadata
- Markdown keeps the content readable in any editor
- Slide separators keep the structure obvious
- The output stays focused on one portable artifact: `slides.html`

??? notes
- Stress portability over clever syntax.
- Point out that the repo owns the contract, not a hidden prompt.

---
